resume_text:
Alex Reyes
San Francisco, CA

Summary
Senior backend engineer with 7 years of experience building large-scale web services in Python and Go. Previously at Stripe and a fintech startup. Comfortable owning systems end-to-end.

Skills
Python, Go, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Kubernetes, AWS, Docker, system design, observability, CI/CD

Experience
- Designed and shipped a payments routing service handling 40K requests per second.
- Reduced latency on a hot path by 38% by introducing connection pooling and prepared statements.
- Mentored 4 junior engineers across two teams.

Education
B.S. Computer Science, UC Berkeley

Priya Subramanian
Boston, MA

Summary
Data scientist focused on retention modeling and experimentation. 4 years of experience at consumer subscription companies.

Python, SQL, pandas, scikit-learn, A/B testing, statistics, Tableau, machine learning

Experience
- Built a churn prediction model that lifted retention by 12% over 6 months.
- Designed and analyzed 9 multi-variant experiments shipping to 1.2M users.
- Owned weekly retention readouts to leadership.

Education
M.S. Statistics, Boston University
